title: Cardinal Health's Outcomes™ collaborates with Signify Health to offer in-home medication therapy management
text: DUBLIN, Ohio , March 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health  (NYSE:CAH) today announced its collaboration with Signify Health (NYSE:SGFY) to offer in-home clinical and medication management services through its Outcomes™ business. This collaboration will help reduce costs and eliminate gaps in care for more than 2.3 million members nationwide to support their treatment journey from prescription to pharmacy to home.
